title: alphonsea coriacea
intro: Alphonsea coriacea, also known as the Philippine nutmeg or Malabangan nutmeg, is a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae, native to the Philippines. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Alphonsea coriacea include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system, as well as its ability to act as a natural remedy for digestive issues and skin conditions. Alphonsea coriacea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and derive its health benefits.
